prompt: Create a solution spec: Automated Employee VerificationAI. Target user: Recruiting Manager at a US or EU bank with 50+ employees. Solution: Automated employee verification service that verifies employment and identity using publicly available data sources. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
source_text: ThreatMark | Security, Machine Learning | REMOTE(World) / Brno, Czech Republic | Equity ThreatMark protects >50M end users from finacial fraud and saves > $100M every year in losses. We are working with top banks in EU and US to protect their end users. We develop large-behavioral models that recognizes returning users by their mouse movements, keystroke timings and sensoric data (accelerometer, gyroscope). We detect cyberthreats (e.g. malware, phishing, scraping) by exploiting browsers/sandboxes of devices. We manage ~PB scale of data and provide realtime scoring in milliseconds driving authentication/authorization flow (2nd factor). Stack: [python, typescript, rust], [redis, postgresql], [aws, terraform] ... We are looking for exceptional engineers to build with us and be part of the success: - Backend Engineer [rust, python] - low-latency stream processing engine, rewrite python microservices to rust - DevOps Engineer (IaaC in AWS) If you are interested, please email us @ career@threatmark.com with subject "HN Who's Hiring" If you don't find the right role here or at  https://www.threatmark.com/careers/ , write us anyway if you believe you can be good fit :) Krystof Hilar, Co-Founder & CTO

prompt: Create a solution spec: Third-party Vendor RiskAI. Target user: Risk Manager at a company with 500+ employees and 100+ vendors. Solution: Third-party vendor risk assessment and management platform that provides AI-powered risk scores and recommendations. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

prompt: Create a solution spec: A Decentralized JobAI. Target user: Senior hiring manager at a startup or scale-up interested in decentralized technologies. Solution: A decentralized job board and talent pipeline platform to streamline recruitment and talent attraction. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
source_text: Category Labs |  https://www.category.xyz/  | Remote and NYC | Full Time | $200K USD+ Category Labs (formerly known as Monad Labs) is a team of systems engineers and researchers on a mission to design and build at the frontier of decentralized technology. We strive to design and build step-function improvements over existing blockchain solutions. After raising $225M in series A funding, led by Paradigm, we are growing our team.
